title: Runs small
body: I ordered this top online and immediately returned it to the store. It was too small. I usually wear size 8 (medium) but tried on large and extra large at the store. I chose the extra large to allow for a little shrinkage as the fabric is 95% cotton.

title: Perfect layering piece
body: Love this vest! I wear it over a white tee and it looks so put together. The rib knit fabric has a nice weight to it. Got the Faded Denim color and it's gorgeous.

title: Great basic
body: Bought this in black and white. The button-loop closures are cute and the lettuce trim gives it a feminine touch. True to size for me in medium.

title: Cute but runs very small
body: The style is adorable but it runs at least one size small. I'm normally a medium and had to exchange for a large. The large fits like a typical medium. Be warned.

title: Obsessed with this vest
body: I bought all four colors. At $14.99 each on sale, you can't beat it. The cotton blend is soft and breathable. Perfect for Florida weather.

title: Office appropriate
body: I wear this under a blazer at work and it looks very professional. The Moon Rock color is a beautiful neutral. Only wish it was a tiny bit longer.

title: Too tight in the bust
body: Even sizing up, this vest is very tight across the chest. I'm a 38D and the XL was still pulling at the buttons. The fitted style doesn't work for larger busts. Returned.

title: Amazing value
body: $14.99 for this quality? Yes please. The rib knit is thick enough that it doesn't look cheap. I've washed it three times and it still looks brand new.

title: Great for petites
body: I'm 5'2 and the petite medium fits perfectly. The length is just right - hits at my hip bone. The Faded Denim color is more of a dusty blue-gray in person.

title: Buttons popped off first wear
body: Wore this once and two of the loop buttons came undone. The construction quality is poor. The fabric itself is nice but what's the point if it falls apart? Returning.

title: My new favorite top
body: This is the most flattering vest I've found. The crew neck is modest enough for my taste and the fitted silhouette is slimming. Bought the black - goes with everything.

title: Cute with high-waisted jeans
body: Love pairing this with high-waisted jeans. The cropped-ish length is trendy. Got the white and it's not see-through which is a plus. Runs a little snug so size up.

title: Nice fabric, weird fit
body: The cotton blend feels great but the fit is strange. It's tight in the bust but loose at the waist. I'm an hourglass shape and it doesn't flatter my figure. The lettuce trim is cute though.

title: Faded Denim is stunning
body: The Faded Denim color is absolutely beautiful in person. It's a muted blue-gray that goes with so many things. The fabric has a nice stretch to it. Will be buying more colors.

title: Good for layering
body: I wear this over a long-sleeve tee and it adds a nice layered look. The buttons are decorative which I like. Wish they had more color options. Got the Moon Rock.

title: So comfortable
body: The stretch in this vest is amazing. 95% cotton with 5% spandex means it moves with you. I even wore it to a casual yoga class. The black is my go-to.

title: Shrunk after first wash
body: I followed the care instructions - machine wash, tumble dry - and it shrunk noticeably. It was already snug before washing. Now it's unwearable. Very disappointed.

title: Perfect summer top
body: Sleeveless and lightweight - exactly what I need for Miami heat. The white color is crisp and clean. Not see-through at all. Great with shorts or a skirt.

title: Not plus-size friendly
body: The XXL is the largest size and it barely fits a size 16. JCPenney needs to extend the size range. The style is cute but not accessible for curvy women. Very frustrating.

title: Timeless wardrobe staple
body: This is a classic piece that won't go out of style. The crew neck and button details are tasteful. I got the black for work and the Faded Denim for weekends. Size up one.

title: Better than expected
body: For the price, this vest exceeded my expectations. The rib knit has a premium feel. The Faded Denim color is exactly as pictured. True to size for me in small.

title: Decent but nothing special
body: It's a basic vest. The quality is okay for the price. The buttons feel a bit flimsy. I wouldn't pay full price ($30) but at the sale price it's fine.

title: Street style vibes
body: This vest gives major street style energy. I wear it unbuttoned over a bralette with wide-leg pants. The Moon Rock color is chef's kiss. Runs small - I sized up to medium.

title: Easy care, easy wear
body: Love that I can just throw this in the wash. No special care needed. It comes out looking great every time. I hang dry mine to be safe though. The black hasn't faded at all.

title: Good under scrubs
body: I wear this under my scrub top as a base layer. It's comfortable for long shifts. The sleeveless design keeps me cool. Wish the armholes were a bit smaller though - they gape a little.

title: Retro cute
body: The button-loop closures give this a vintage feel that I absolutely love. Paired with a midi skirt it looks like something from a 90s catalog in the best way. Got the white.

title: Inconsistent sizing
body: I ordered two colors in the same size (large) and they fit completely differently. The black is tighter than the Faded Denim. Quality control issue for sure.

title: Five stars all around
body: Soft fabric, flattering fit, great price. What more could you want? I'm 5'7, 140 lbs and the medium fits perfectly. The lettuce trim at the hem is a nice detail.

title: Great for the golf course
body: I wear this on the golf course with a skort. The sleeveless design gives full range of motion. The Moon Rock color doesn't show sweat. Very practical and stylish.

title: Color is different in person
body: The Moon Rock color looks beige/tan online but in person it's more of a grayish-mauve. Not bad, just different from what I expected. The fabric quality is nice though.

title: Bought for all my daughters
body: My three daughters (ages 22, 25, 28) all loved mine so I bought each of them one. At this price point it's an easy gift. The quality holds up well to frequent washing.

title: Not for curvy girls
body: I'm a size 14 with a large bust (36DD) and even the XL was pulling across the chest. The fitted style is not designed for curves. Wish they made a relaxed fit version.

title: Capsule wardrobe essential
body: This vest is a capsule wardrobe dream. The black goes with literally everything. Clean lines, no fuss. I've worn it 10+ times already and it still looks new.

title: Pilled after two washes
body: The fabric started pilling after just two washes. Little fuzz balls everywhere, especially under the arms. For a cotton blend I expected better. Looks worn out already.

title: Charming details
body: The lettuce trim and loop buttons give this vest so much charm. It elevates a simple outfit. I wore it to brunch with white linen pants and got compliments all day.

title: Stacked with coupon
body: Got this for $11.24 with the STYLE25 code on top of the sale price. Absolute steal. The quality is way above what you'd expect at this price. Bought two.

title: Trendy on a budget
body: All my friends are wearing vests like this. JCPenney's version is just as cute as the $50 ones at other stores. The Faded Denim is my fave. Runs a tad small.

title: Perfect for transitional weather
body: In Wisconsin we need layers. This vest over a long-sleeve tee is my go-to for spring and fall. Not too hot, not too cold. The Moon Rock pairs well with earth tones.

title: Returned immediately
body: The fabric felt scratchy against my skin, nothing like the soft cotton I expected. Maybe I got a bad batch? The seams inside were rough too. Returned same day.

title: Business casual approved
body: My office has a business casual dress code and this vest passes with flying colors. Tucked into dress pants with a blazer, it looks polished. The black is a must-have.

title: Good for yard work too
body: I wear this for everything - gardening, errands, lunch with friends. It's comfortable and easy to move in. The cotton breathes well. Just wish the armholes were slightly smaller.

title: Too short for tall women
body: I'm 5'10 and this vest barely covers my waistband. The 22-inch length is fine for average height but if you're tall, it's basically a crop top. Fabric is nice though.

title: Decent construction
body: As someone who sews, I inspected the construction. The seams are adequate but not exceptional. The button loops could be reinforced better. The rib knit fabric itself is good quality for the price.

title: Beach vacation essential
body: Packed three of these for my beach trip. They're lightweight, don't wrinkle, and look cute over a swimsuit. The white one is my favorite. No regrets buying multiples.

title: You get what you pay for
body: At $14.99 the quality is acceptable. At the original $30 I'd be disappointed. The fabric is thinner than I expected and the buttons feel like they could pop off. Decent for the sale price.

title: Love the a.n.a brand
body: A.N.A never disappoints me. This vest is consistent with their quality. Soft, well-made, and stylish. I have probably 15 a.n.a pieces in my closet. This one is a winner.

title: Not for cold weather
body: Obviously it's sleeveless so don't expect warmth. But as a layering piece under a cardigan or jacket, it works great. The fitted style means no bunching under outer layers.

title: Color accurate online
body: The Faded Denim color matches the website photos pretty closely. Maybe slightly more gray in person but very close. The Black and White are exactly as shown. Moon Rock is a touch more purple than expected.

title: Shrinks in the dryer
body: If you tumble dry this, expect it to shrink about half a size. I now hang dry mine and it's fine. But the care label says tumble dry is okay, which is misleading. Size up if you plan to machine dry.

title: Saturday uniform
body: This vest with jeans and sneakers is my weekend uniform now. So easy and looks effortlessly cool. The Faded Denim color gets the most compliments. Highly recommend.

title: Great gift idea
body: Bought this as a birthday gift for my sister and she loved it. The quality looks more expensive than it is. Comes in a nice JCPenney bag. She got the Moon Rock and wears it constantly.

title: Slightly itchy
body: I have sensitive skin and the rib knit texture is slightly irritating. It's not terrible but I notice it. Wearing a thin cami underneath solves the problem. The style is cute otherwise.

title: Third time buying
body: This is my third a.n.a vest purchase. I wore out the first two from constant use. That tells you how much I love this style. The current version feels slightly thicker than previous ones.

title: Dressed it up for dinner
body: Wore the black vest with a statement necklace and leather pants for date night. Got tons of compliments. It can definitely be dressed up or down. Very versatile piece.

title: Wash inside out
body: Tip: wash this inside out on gentle cycle and hang dry. It keeps its shape and color perfectly. I've washed mine 20+ times with no issues. The black hasn't faded one bit.

title: Looks cheap in person
body: The photos online make this look much nicer than it is. In person the fabric looks thin and the buttons look plasticky. Maybe my expectations were too high. It's fine for $15 I guess.

title: Athleisure approved
body: I wear this with leggings and it's the perfect athleisure look. The stretch fabric moves with you. Not too dressy, not too casual. The Faded Denim with black leggings is my combo.

title: Bought for granddaughter
body: My 19-year-old granddaughter picked this out. She says it's very trendy right now. I think it looks nice on her. The quality seems good for the price. She got the white.

title: Average quality
body: The thread count on this isn't great. I can see some loose threads at the seams after a few wears. The design is cute and the fit is okay but the construction could be better.

title: Best JCPenney find this year
body: Between the sale price and the coupon code, I got this for practically nothing. The quality is surprisingly good. The Faded Denim is my favorite color. Already planning to buy backups before they sell out.
